title: Careless Whisper
meaning_summary: This song remains commercially durable because its melody, sax lead, and emotional directness make it instantly recognizable and highly replayable.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming remains the largest recurring revenue driver.
Strong cultural memory keeps the song active across playlists and rediscovery.
Sync and retrospective use help renew audience demand.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Careless Whisper is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
